ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "account_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the player's account */,
  "summoner_name" TEXT /* Summoner name of the player */,
  "kda" REAL /* Average Kill/Death/Assist (KDA) ratio */,
  "avg_kills" REAL /* Average number of kills per game */,
  "avg_deaths" REAL /* Average number of deaths per game */,
  "avg_assists" REAL /* Average number of assists per game */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* Win rate percentage */,
  "vision_wards" INTEGER /* Average number of vision wards placed per game */,
  "wards_killed" INTEGER /* Average number of wards killed per game */,
  "wards_placed" INTEGER /* Average number of wards placed per game */,
  "towers_killed" INTEGER /* Average number of towers destroyed per game */,
  "inhibitor_kills" INTEGER /* Average number of inhibitors destroyed per game */,
  "dragons_killed" INTEGER /* Average number of dragons killed per game */,
  "rift_herald_killed" INTEGER /* Average number of Rift Heralds killed per game */,
  "baron_killed" INTEGER /* Average number of Barons killed per game */,
  "kill_contribution" REAL /* Average contribution to team kills (percentage) */,
  "total_damage_dealt_to_champions" INTEGER /* Total damage dealt to champions */,
  "total_damage_taken" INTEGER /* Total damage taken from champions */,
  "total_heal" INTEGER /* Total healing done */,
  "cc_duration" REAL /* Total crowd control duration applied */,
  "gold_earned" INTEGER /* Total gold earned */,
  "avg_game_length" REAL /* Average game length in seconds */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the player plays */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Current rank of the player */,
  "tier" TEXT /* Current tier of the player */,
  "most_played_champions" TEXT /* Most played champions by the player */,
  "match_history_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the player's match history */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the player's account was created */,
  "last_game_date" TEXT /* Date of the player's last game */,
  "total_games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played by the player */,
  "total_time_played" INTEGER /* Total time (in seconds) the player has spent playing */,
  "champion_mastery_points" TEXT /* Champion mastery points for each champion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the role is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
